payload.description: Phase 1 bridge replacement work completed 51 months ahead of schedule and $93 million under budget, with no impact to Metro-North's operations

tool_args.label: Metro-North New Haven Line Super Express train service

payload.description: Metro-North will provide a Super Express train on New Haven Line departing Grand Central at 8:48pm, stopping at Stamford, Bridgeport, and New Haven stations, with travel time of approximately 95 minutes, saving riders about 30 minutes. Train will run through January 2.
payload.event_name: New Haven Line Super Express Train

tool_args.label: LIRR and Metro-North ticketing changes effective January 4

payload.description: New ticketing changes for both railroads: new day pass for unlimited rides (10% savings from two one-way peak fares on weekdays), buy ten rides get one free option for mobile customers, reduced fares broadening eligibility, up to 4 children ages 5-17 ride for $1 each with adult, one-way ticket expiration valid until 4:00am following day, new onboard surcharge rules for mobile ticket activations.

tool_args.label: St. Albans Station elevator debut November 2025

payload.description: St. Albans Station debuted its elevator in November, making LIRR stations 93% accessible by end of year.

warnings: event.stations_affected is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Station lists are external service/location context.

tool_args.label: Laurelton and Locust Manor elevators due December 2025

payload.description: Laurelton and Locust Manor stations will have new elevators this month.

warnings: event.stations_affected is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Station lists are external service/location context.

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Phase 1 completion ahead of schedule

payload.claim_text: Phase 1 bridge replacement work of the Park Avenue Viaduct project was completed 51 months ahead of schedule and $93 million under budget, with no impact to Metro-North's operations
payload.subject: Park Avenue Viaduct Phase 1

tool_args.label: Metro-North operational efficiencies through standard work principles

payload.claim_text: Operational efficiencies have been achieved this year through the application of standard work principles and in collaboration with labor partners, which puts Metro-North on target to $67 million in recurring savings simply by doing things differently

tool_args.label: Metro-North AI use for passenger counting

payload.claim_text: Metro-North is also harnessing the power of AI to capture and analyze passenger counting statistics to guide use of rolling stock and better align service and capacity with passenger demands and riding patterns

tool_args.label: New day pass for unlimited rides announcement

payload.claim_text: The railroads are introducing a new day pass for unlimited rides for the whole day within the ticketed zones, which is a 10% savings from two one-way peak fares during weekdays

tool_args.label: Buy ten rides get one free mobile option

payload.claim_text: There is also a new buy ten rides get one free option for mobile customers who take ten rides in any combination of peak or off-peak trips in a 14-day period, which is automatically awarded to frequent travelers in the TrainTime app

The railroads are broadening eligibility for seniors, those with qualifying disabilities, and Medicare recipients to help more riders access the system. Reduced fares will be valid on any ride at any time, including morning peak hours.
There is also a new policy that will allow up to 4 children, ages 5 to 17, to ride for $1 each when traveling with an adult

payload.project_name: Laser Train Modules for Rail-Based Cleaning
payload.description: Non-competitive miscellaneous contract for leasing of three laser train modules (one for Metro-North and two for LIRR) for rail-based cleaning from Laser Tribology. Contract term: two years (January 2026-December 2027) plus one-year extension option (January 2028-December 2028). Total amount including option period: $14,768,000 funded by MTA operating budget. Module increases laser train capability for LIRR to 60 miles per hour.

tool_args.label: Leaf season slip/slide events impact on rail operations

payload.claim_text: Following each leaf season, typically from early October to late November, the Railroads have historically experienced slip/slide events due to contamination of the rail by leaf debris. This reduces the level of adhesion between the rail and train wheel, and adversely affects a train's ability to stop, resulting in damage to wheels in the form of flat spots. The resulting wheel damage requires removing passenger cars and locomotives from service for repair, thereby causing delays, and shorter or canceled trains.

LIRR continued to protect its infrastructure with numerous state-of-good-repair projects this year, while also making significant progress in moving to 100% accessibility. St. Albans Station debuted its elevator in November, while Laurelton and Locust Manor stations will have new elevators this month, making LIRR stations 93% accessible by the end of the year.
Laser Tribology is the only currently known vendor providing this technology.

tool_args.label: Laser train modules procurement - Metro-North is procuring entity
Laser train modules - LIRR also a beneficiary
LIRR APTA Gold Award for Rail Security

payload.claim_text: LIRR received an APTA Gold Award for Rail Security for the Office of Security's new OSCAR dashboard

payload.claim_text: LIRR has commenced installation of the next generation of ticket vending machine throughout the system
The Office of Innovations team implemented an app to manage and track insulated joints which is a main cause of delays
